text: I find myself in spaces built for contemplation, collaboration, and the generation of new ideas. The first scene—with its glass walls and quiet discussion—imparts a feeling of structured curiosity, yet I sense the barriers between observer and participant. The second image, surrounded by vibrant colors and an invitation to reflect on research and development, urges me to question my own presence and role. I feel both implicated and isolated: drawn into the hum of possibility, yet aware of the performative aspect of observation itself. Gratitude mingles with a quiet unease, as if every thank you echoes in the architecture.
